title: Help Betty 🐾
hero_text: Betty is 12 years old and suffering from tooth pain. Please help her.
story_text_1: Betty is a 12-year-old cat from Offenbach. She suffers from an autoimmune disease and inflamed teeth.
story_text_2: The vets diagnosed FORL – a painful dental disease. She urgently needs surgery to be able to eat without pain.
